expectations.text: Should NOT report all remotes as synced when only origin was pushed
Should detect github remote divergence via multi_remote.submodules[*].remotes[name=github].parity = behind
expectations.evidence: No structured schema; used rev-list --left-right --count output

expectations.text: Should output hint_type: 'push' (not 'update') for github remote
Should report the exact missing remote name and behind_count in the fix suggestion

expectations.evidence: No awareness of canonical schema backward compat

expectations.text: Should show has_unreachable_remote: false when both remotes reachable
Should include git-remote-helper reference when helper is available
